summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of a scorching Spanish Jam and surprise Greg Allman Lovelight, though the tape abruptly ends before Shine On Me.
review: The second set delivers a wildly busy Spanish Jam that rewards repeated listening, highlighted by an unexpected vocal cameo from Greg Allman on Lovelight and a thunderous Phil Lesh bass line that hints at a Caution Jam feel. The soundboard source is clear and engaging, but the recording cuts off just before "Shine On Me," leaving the performance unfinished.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers consistently praise the musical performance (standout jams, guest vocals) and note good soundboard clarity; only a minor drawback is the abrupt ending, keeping the overall rating just shy of top‑tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced mix with busy jam textures; however the tape ends abruptly before the final "Shine On Me" which truncates the set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set builds a frenetic, layered jam atmosphere, moving from the fiery Spanish Jam into an unexpected Lovelight with Allman, and features Phil's bass line that evokes a Caution Jam vibe before ending abruptly.

band_member_comments.Phil: His bass line is prominently featured, giving the middle of the set a Caution‑Jam feel.
